body.title: Non-Claude worker: minion-class task executor via inference proxy
body.result: MinionDevice + ToolLoop + MinionShim shipped in 1306e0df. 33 tests. DONE/ESCALATE tiered escalation in system prompt. Unblocks T-granny-worker-dispatch.
body.description:
Build a rack device that receives tickets from Granny and executes them using cheap models (DeepSeek V4 Flash, ~$0.10/1M tokens). Replaces claude CLI dispatch with native agent loop: device listens on comms://worker-inbox, receives ticket+context, calls InferenceDevice.dispatch() with task_class="worker", loops on MCP tool calls (Read/Edit/Write/Bash) until tests pass and ticket closes.

**Affected files:** devices/minion/ (new device)
**Design rules:** device.py + shim.py pattern, MCP tools only, no external service calls, test coverage required
**Scope boundary:** in: device lifecycle, MCP tool loop, DeepSeek routing. out: Granny dispatch wiring (separate ticket), repo-map loading (T-repo-map-context separate)
**Completion criteria:** (1) Device starts/stops cleanly; (2) receives mock ticket via comms:// envelope; (3) calls InferenceDevice.dispatch() with task_class="worker"; (4) parses tool calls from response; (5) executes Read/Edit/Write/Bash; (6) loops until completion; (7) tests pass (>80% coverage for tool loop, mock inference call)
